zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine de Home於1420年出生在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾霍米時，她的父親Alexander Home 1st Lord Home12歲，母親Lady Marion Lauder11417歲。她和John St Clair of Herdmanston and Polwarth至少有2個女兒。她去世於1472年5月4日在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine de Home于1420年出生在苏格兰貝維其可爾霍米时，她的父亲Alexander Home 1st Lord Home12岁，母亲Lady Marion Lauder11417岁。她和John St Clair of Herdmanston and Polwarth至少有2个女儿。她去世于1472年5月4日在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Home
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Hume  .

English: habitational name from Home in Clifton on Teme or in Feckenham (Worcestershire) or from a minor place similarly named, a variant of Hamm (from Middle English ham(me), with rounding of the vowel before the nasal consonant to give hom(me)).

variants.name: Hume
meanings: Scottish (Lowlands) and northern English: variant of Hulme , with loss of l before the bilabial consonant /m/, as in the vocabulary word calm. See Holm and Home .

Scottish: habitational name either from the barony of Home or from Hume (or Home) in Berwickshire, from which the barony took its name. The placename derives from Old English hōum, dative plural form of hōh ‘heel, spur of land’.
History: A family of this name (see 2 above) have held the Earldom of Home since 1605.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine de Home was born in 1420, in Home, Berwickshire, Scotland, her father, Alexander Home 1st Lord Home, was 12 and her mother, Lady Marion Lauder, was 11417. She had at least 2 daughters with John St Clair of Herdmanston and Polwarth. She died on 4 May 1472, in Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine de Home est née en 1420, à Home, Berwickshire, Écosse, son père, Alexander Home 1st Lord Home, avait 12 ans et sa mère, Lady Marion Lauder, avait 11417 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 filles avec John St Clair of Herdmanston and Polwarth. Elle est décédée le 4 mai 1472, à Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine de Home 1420 in Home, Berwickshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander Home 1st Lord Home 12 und ihre Mutter Lady Marion Lauder 11417. Sie hatte mit John St Clair of Herdmanston and Polwarth mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. Mai 1472 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine de Home è nata il nel 1420 nel Home, Berwickshire, Scotland, sua padre, Alexander Home 1st Lord Home, aveva 12 anni e sua madre, Lady Marion Lauder, aveva 11417 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figlie con John St Clair of Herdmanston and Polwarth. Morì il 4 maggio 1472, nel Haddingtonshire, Scotland, all'età di 52 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine de Home(이)가 1420년 스컷랜드 버윅실르 홈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Home 1st Lord Home(은)는 12세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Marion Lauder(은)는 11417세였다. 그녀는 John St Clair of Herdmanston and Polwarth(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1472년 5월 4일 스컷랜드 하딩토실르에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine de Home родилась в 1420 г. в местности хом, бирвиккшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Alexander Home 1st Lord Home было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Marion Lauder, 11417. У неё было по крайней мере 2 дочери от John St Clair of Herdmanston and Polwarth. Она умерла 4 мая 1472 г. в местности хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 52 лет.
